title: floats — Architecture Overview
description: MVVM + Repository pattern. SQLite (GRDB) local DB. Background sync engine for cron updates.

nodes.label: SwiftUI Views
nodes.description: Presentation layer. Renders state from ViewModel, sends user intents back.

nodes.label: ViewModels
nodes.description: @Observable view models. Hold UI state, call repository, never touch network/DB directly.

nodes.label: Repository Layer
nodes.description: Data access abstraction. Decides local vs remote. Writes local first (offline-first).

nodes.label: SQLite Database (GRDB)
nodes.description: On-device persistence via GRDB.swift. Source of truth for offline-first.

nodes.label: Sync Engine
nodes.description: Background fetch task (BGAppRefreshTask). Pulls remote data on schedule, writes to local DB. Exponential backoff retry.

nodes.label: API Client
nodes.description: URLSession + async/await. Handles remote fetch for sync engine + repository.

nodes.label: Domain Models
nodes.description: Sendable structs. Shared across layers. DB records map to these.
